description_long: This rifle features a futuristic, sci-fi inspired design with a streamlined, angular body and a prominent blade-like extension beneath the barrel. The main body is predominantly metallic blue with red and silver accents, giving it a high-tech, aggressive appearance. The grip is ergonomically shaped and integrated into the lower section, while the upper receiver is adorned with small, intricate details and a dorsal fin-like ridge. The barrel is elongated and tapers to a sharp point, with a serrated edge along the blade extension, suggesting a hybrid melee capability. The rifle lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a compact rear section that flows seamlessly into the main body. The overall finish is sleek and glossy, with visible panel lines and mechanical elements that enhance its advanced, weaponized look.
description: A futuristic, metallic blue rifle with red accents, a serrated blade extension, and a sleek, high-tech design. The weapon features an ergonomic grip and a streamlined, stockless body.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the serrated blade extension and detailed body contours.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the pointed barrel and symmetrical design, with the blade extension visible below.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's streamlined profile and the integration of the grip and blade.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the compact, stockless back and the alignment of the barrel and grip.
